mapper.select: SELECT isu_cd FROM krx_daily_trade WHERE bas_dd = (SELECT MAX(bas_dd) FROM krx_daily_trade) ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(acc_trdval, ',', '') AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t1.isu_cd, t1.isu_nm, (CAST(REPLACE(t1.tdd_clsprc, ',', '') AS SIGNED) - CAST(REPLACE(t2.tdd_clsprc, ',', '') AS SIGNED)) / CAST(REPLACE(t2.tdd_clsprc, ',', '') AS SIGNED) as return_rate FROM krx_daily_trade t1 JOIN krx_daily_trade t2 ON t1.isu_cd = t2.isu_cd WHERE t1.bas_dd = (SELECT MAX(bas_dd) FROM krx_daily_trade) AND t2.bas_dd = ( SELECT MIN(bas_dd) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT bas_dd FROM krx_daily_trade ORDER BY bas_dd DESC LIMIT #{days} ) tmp ) ORDER BY return_rate DESC

-- 실제 구현 시 krx_daily_trade_investor 테이블 등 수급 데이터 활용 SELECT isu_cd, SUM(CAST(acc_trdval AS UNSIGNED)) as total_val FROM krx_daily_trade WHERE bas_dd >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY isu_cd ORDER BY total_val DESC
